topic: Best time of day to propagate succulents in winter

topic: Why does my cat stare at the wall at 3am?
description: Tests pure question/explanation intent. Expected: Reasons/Theories.

topic: Essential maintenance tips for industrial ball bearings
description: Tests technical accuracy and 'Essential' trigger. Expected: Specific technical maintenance steps.
